all_items.Epic Decks Inventory System: 1. Add every slab, single, or sealed product as one row in Inventory_Master.
2. Keep SKU unique. Suggested format: ED-SLAB-0001, ED-SINGLE-0001, ED-SEALED-0001.
3. Update Whatnot fields when an item is listed: whatnot_store, whatnot_listing_url, listing_status.
4. Set featured_on_site to Yes for items you want shown on the homepage.
5. Run inventory_to_json.py whenever you want to export website-ready JSON.
6. Upload the exported JSON file to your site folder later when we wire the homepage.
Use this workbook as the master inventory source. Whatnot remains the live selling channel. Your website should show featured items and link out to Whatnot.
